name: Orange, Lettuce, and Walnut Salad (Shlada Bellecheen)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the lettuce and section it into leaves, discarding the tough outer ones.
2. Drain the oranges and wrap them in paper towels to dry. Store in the refrigerator until needed.
3. Peel the oranges and remove all outside membranes using a small serrated knife. Section the oranges by cutting away the membranes from the orange flesh. Place each section in a mixing bowl and squeeze the juice over them to keep them moist. Cover and keep chilled.
4. Make the dressing by mixing the lemon juice, sugar, salt, cinnamon, orange flower water, and 2 tablespoons of orange juice. Blend well and taste. Adjust sweetness if needed.
5. Just before serving, shred the lettuce and arrange it in a glass serving dish. Pour the dressing over the lettuce and toss gently.
6. Create a design around the edges with overlapping sections of orange. Sprinkle the salad with chopped walnuts and dust with more cinnamon.
7. Serve immediately.
